title: My mythforges
subtitle: Open an Mythforge to manage documents, projects, and membership.
selectGuildDescription: Switch into a guild to view its mythforges and memberships.
loadError: Unable to load mythforges right now.
noinitiativesDescription: You’re not part of any mythforges in this guild. Check back after an admin invites you or create one if you have permissions.

createDialog.title: Create Mythforge
createDialog.description: Give it a name, optional description, and color to organize projects.
createDialog.colorHint: This accent appears on projects tied to the Mythforge.
createDialog.createError: Unable to create Mythforge right now.

detail.notFoundDescription: The Mythforge you’re looking for doesn’t exist or you no longer have access.
detail.noAccess: You do not have access to any features in this Mythforge. Contact an Mythforge manager for assistance.

settings.title: Mythforge settings
settings.subtitle: Update details, manage members and roles, and control dangerous actions.
settings.notFoundDescription: The Mythforge you’re looking for doesn’t exist or you no longer have access.
settings.permissionRequiredDescription: Only guild admins and Mythforge project managers can manage Mythforge settings.
settings.detailsDescription: Rename, describe, or recolor this Mythforge.
settings.editPermissionNote: Only guild admins or Mythforge project managers can edit details.
settings.updateError: Unable to update Mythforge right now.
settings.membersDescription: Mythforge project managers and guild admins can manage membership.
settings.addMemberError: Unable to add member right now.
settings.unableToLoadMembers: Unable to load potential members right now.
settings.removeMemberError: Unable to remove member right now.
settings.roleUpdateError: Unable to update role right now.
settings.rolesDescription: Configure what each role can do within this Mythforge. Project Manager permissions are locked to prevent accidental lockouts.
settings.dangerDescription: Deleting an Mythforge removes all of its projects, tasks, and documents.
settings.defaultCannotDelete: The default Mythforge cannot be deleted.
settings.contactAdmin: Contact a guild admin ({{adminLabel}}) to delete this Mythforge.
settings.deleteError: Unable to delete Mythforge right now.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: <bold>{{name}}</bold> and everything inside it (projects, tasks, documents, queues, events) will be sent to the trash. You can restore the whole tree from Settings → Trash before the retention period ends.
settings.createRoleDescription: Add a new role with custom permissions for this Mythforge.
settings.roleInternalNameHint: Lowercase, no spaces. Used internally for identification.
settings.deleteRoleDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{{roleName}}"? This action cannot be undone.
settings.renameRoleDescription: Change the display name for the "{{roleName}}" role.
settings.removeMemberDescription: Are you sure you want to remove <bold>{{name}}</bold> from this Mythforge?
settings.removeMemberWarning: This will also remove their explicit access to all projects and documents in this Mythforge.
settings.roleNameRequired: Name and display name are required.

advancedToolsDescription: Enable optional tools for this Mythforge.
queuesFeatureDescription: Organize items by priority, track turn order, and manage who goes next.
eventsFeatureDescription: Schedule and manage calendar events with attendees and RSVP tracking.
countersFeatureDescription: Track numeric values like HP, scores, or budgets — clamped, stepped, and shown as numbers, bars, or radial gauges.
advancedToolFeatureDescription: Embed the {{name}} panel under this Mythforge.

advancedTool.handoffFailed: Couldn’t establish a secure session with the embedded tool.
advancedTool.iframeError: The embedded tool failed to load.
advancedTool.unavailableDescription: This deployment does not have an advanced tool configured.
advancedTool.disabledDescription: Enable it from the Mythforge’s settings page to load the panel.
advancedTool.guildAdminOnlyDescription: Only guild admins can manage automations at the guild level.
